name: Mad Paws Holdings Limited
summary: Mad Paws Holdings Limited operates pet care services online marketplace. Its marketplace matches and connects pet owners seeking pet care services, such as pet sitting, walking, daycare, and grooming, with pet sitters, walkers, and other pet service providers registered on the marketplace. It also offers pet food subscription service providing pet owners with pre-prepared, individually packed meals for pets. In addition, it provides pet insurance products. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Sydney, Australia.
